title: Palm Tyres: The goal is to keep delivering the highest standard of service
description: BUSINESS NEWS - Wow - what an incredible...
bodyText:
Gallery
                            Sponsored Content

BUSINESS NEWS - Wow - what an incredible honour it is to win the award for best Tyre Fitment Centre 2025!


> First and foremost, on behalf of the entire team at Palm Tyre, we want to say a massive thank you to everyone who voted for us.


We know the calibre of businesses in this industry, and to be chosen for this award among such strong competition is truly humbling.

To our customers - thank you. Your trust, loyalty, and word-of-mouth support are the driving force behind our success. Whether you came in for a quick puncture repair or a full set of tyres, we value every single visit and every kind word you've shared.

To our team - this award belongs to each and every one of you. Your hard work, dedication, and attention to detail are what make our shop more than just a place to buy tyres - it's a place people can rely on.


> From the front desk to the workshop floor, your passion for what we do shows in every service, every recommendation, and every smile. Through their hard work and dedication, we are very proud to be receiving this award. Teamwork makes the dream work.


Winning this award isn’t the end goal - it’s motivation to keep improving, keep innovating, and keep delivering the highest standard of service. Our daily inspiration and drive for making Palm Tyre a success since 1978 is our Lord, Jesus Christ.

We are blessed abundantly through every season in our business, and we praise Him for what has been and what still lies ahead.

Once again, thank you all for this incredible recognition. Here's to safe journeys, quality service, and continued growth in our industry. Thank you!

‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’
